AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class AnnotationCategoryMap

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Provides a bidirectional mapping between logical annotation categories used in configuration XML and Revit built-in category tokens stored as strings.

public static class AnnotationCategoryMap
Inheritance
object
AnnotationCategoryMap
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

The annotation configuration uses category identifiers such as MEPFabricationPipework, while Revit APIs commonly reference built-in categories such as OST_FabricationPipework. This helper centralizes the mapping and offers normalization to keep both fields consistent when one side is missing or outdated.

The mappings are case-insensitive.

Methods

NormalizePair(ref string, ref string)

Normalizes a category/revitCategory pair so that the fields are consistent when one side can be derived from the other.

public static void NormalizePair(ref string category, ref string revitCategory)

Parameters

category string

Configuration category token. If non-empty and recognized, revitCategory is set to the mapped value. If empty and revitCategory is recognized, category is set to the mapped value.

revitCategory string

Revit category token to normalize alongside category.

Remarks

This method does not attempt fuzzy matching or partial token resolution; only exact dictionary matches are used.

TryGetCategory(string, out string)

Attempts to map a Revit category token (e.g., OST_FabricationPipework) to a configuration category token (e.g., MEPFabricationPipework).

public static bool TryGetCategory(string revitCategory, out string category)

Parameters

revitCategory string

Revit category token.

category string

Mapped configuration category token, if found.

Returns

bool

true if a mapping exists; otherwise false.

TryGetRevitCategory(string, out string)

Attempts to map a configuration category token (e.g., MEPFabricationPipework) to a Revit category token (e.g., OST_FabricationPipework).

public static bool TryGetRevitCategory(string category, out string revitCategory)

Parameters

category string

Configuration category token.

revitCategory string

Mapped Revit category token, if found.

Returns

bool

true if a mapping exists; otherwise false.
